allow:
Bash(# Try using AppleScript to click the Select Model button via accessibility
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "ANEMLLChat"
        -- Get all buttons
        set allButtons to every button of every window
        return allButtons
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(# Try clicking the Select Model button via AppleScript accessibility
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "ANEMLLChat" to activate
delay 0.5

tell application "System Events"
    tell process "ANEMLLChat"
        -- Get all UI elements
        set allButtons to buttons of window 1
        repeat with b in allButtons
            set btnName to name of b
            if btnName contains "Select" or btnName contains "Model" then
                click b
                return "Clicked: " & btnName
            end if
        end repeat
        return "No matching button found. Buttons: " & (name of allButtons as text)
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(# List all buttons and their properties
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "ANEMLLChat" to activate
delay 0.3

tell application "System Events"
    tell process "ANEMLLChat"
        set allButtons to buttons of window 1
        set buttonInfo to ""
        repeat with i from 1 to count of allButtons
            set b to item i of allButtons
            try
                set btnName to name of b
                set btnDesc to description of b
                set buttonInfo to buttonInfo & "Button " & i & ": " & btnName & " / " & btnDesc & return
            on error
                set buttonInfo to buttonInfo & "Button " & i & ": (no name)" & return
            end try
        end repeat
        return buttonInfo
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(# Explore deeper UI hierarchy
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "ANEMLLChat" to activate
delay 0.3

tell application "System Events"
    tell process "ANEMLLChat"
        -- Get entire UI hierarchy of the window
        set uiElements to entire contents of window 1
        set result to ""
        repeat with elem in uiElements
            try
                set elemClass to class of elem as text
                set elemName to name of elem
                set elemRole to role of elem
                if elemName is not missing value then
                    set result to result & elemClass & ": " & elemName & " (" & elemRole & ")" & return
                end if
            end try
        end repeat
        return result
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(# Use AppleScript to click at coordinates
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "ANEMLLChat" to activate
delay 0.5

tell application "System Events"
    -- Click at specific screen coordinates
    click at {530, 433}
end tell
EOF

sleep 1

# Screenshot
export ANEMLL_HOST=""http://127.0.0.1:8765""
export ANEMLL_TOKEN=""3D53006F-B28D-4CF4-A8AA-F5693CF15FAA""
curl -s -H ""Authorization: Bearer $ANEMLL_TOKEN"" -X POST ""$ANEMLL_HOST/screenshot"")

Bash(# Explore the full UI hierarchy to find the button
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "ANEMLLChat" to activate
delay 0.3

tell application "System Events"
    tell process "ANEMLLChat"
        tell window "ANEMLL Chat"
            -- Get all UI elements recursively
            set result to ""
            set allElements to entire contents
            repeat with elem in allElements
                try
                    set elemClass to class of elem as text
                    set elemRole to role of elem as text
                    set elemTitle to ""
                    try
                        set elemTitle to title of elem
                    end try
                    set elemValue to ""
                    try
                        set elemValue to value of elem as text
                    end try
                    if elemRole contains "Button" or elemTitle contains "Model" or elemValue contains "Model" then
                        set result to result & elemClass & " | " & elemRole & " | title=" & elemTitle & " | value=" & elemValue & return
                    end if
                end try
            end repeat
            return result
        end tell
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(# Explore UI hierarchy with fixed script
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "ANEMLLChat" to activate
delay 0.3

tell application "System Events"
    tell process "ANEMLLChat"
        -- Get buttons specifically
        try
            set allBtns to every button of window "ANEMLL Chat"
            set btnCount to count of allBtns
            return "Buttons in window: " & btnCount
        on error errMsg
            return "Error: " & errMsg
        end try
    end tell
end tell
EOF

echo """"

# Try finding any element with AXRole = AXButton
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "ANEMLLChat"
        -- Look at splitter group structure
        try
            tell window "ANEMLL Chat"
                set grps to every group
                return "Groups: " & (count of grps)
            end tell
        end try
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(# Check what accessibility element is at the click position
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "ANEMLLChat" to activate
delay 0.3

tell application "System Events"
    tell process "ANEMLLChat"
        -- Get the element at the click position (530, 433)
        try
            set el to first UI element of window "ANEMLL Chat" whose position is {530, 433}
            return "Element at position: " & (class of el as text) & " / " & (description of el)
        on error
            -- Try getting element by position relative to window
            set winPos to position of window "ANEMLL Chat"
            set winX to item 1 of winPos
            set winY to item 2 of winPos
            return "Window at: " & winX & "," & winY & " - Click would be at window coords: " & (530 - winX) & "," & (433 - winY)
        end try
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(# Check if cliclick is available
which cliclick 2>/dev/null || echo ""cliclick not installed""

# Try using keyboard shortcut - Command+O might open models
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "ANEMLLChat" to activate
delay 0.3
tell application "System Events"
    keystroke "o" using command down
end tell
EOF

sleep 1

export ANEMLL_HOST=""http://127.0.0.1:8765""
export ANEMLL_TOKEN=""3D53006F-B28D-4CF4-A8AA-F5693CF15FAA""
curl -s -H ""Authorization: Bearer $ANEMLL_TOKEN"" -X POST ""$ANEMLL_HOST/screenshot"")

Bash(# Try accessing via menu
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "ANEMLLChat" to activate
delay 0.3
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "ANEMLLChat"
        -- Check for menu items
        try
            set menuNames to name of every menu of menu bar 1
            return "Menus: " & (menuNames as text)
        on error errMsg
            return "Error: " & errMsg
        end try
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(# Check File menu items
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "ANEMLLChat" to activate
delay 0.2
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "ANEMLLChat"
        tell menu bar 1
            tell menu bar item "File"
                tell menu "File"
                    set itemNames to name of every menu item
                    return itemNames as text
                end tell
            end tell
        end tell
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(# Check View menu for model selection
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "ANEMLLChat" to activate
delay 0.2
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "ANEMLLChat"
        tell menu bar 1
            tell menu bar item "View"
                tell menu "View"
                    set itemNames to name of every menu item
                    return itemNames as text
                end tell
            end tell
        end tell
    end tell
end tell
EOF)

Bash(# Try clicking Add button via AppleScript accessibility
osascript <<'EOF'
tell application "ANEMLLChat" to activate
delay 0.3
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "ANEMLLChat"
        -- Try to find and click the Add button
        try
            click button "Add" of sheet 1 of window 1
            return "Clicked Add button via sheet"
        on error
            try
                click button "Add" of window 1
                return "Clicked Add button via window"
            on error errMsg
                return "Error: " & errMsg
            end try
        end try
    end tell
end tell
EOF)
